name: @codeflow/runtime
description: CodeFlow AI Runtime — Agent Registry + Session Manager + Task Scheduler + Review Engine + Skill Runtime, now backed by fcop@1.1.0 via pythonia (P4 sprint, 5/11). v0.3.0-alpha wires 4 subsystems through the fcop bridge with graceful yaml fallback: TaskParser (Day 2), ReviewWriter + NeedsHumanGate (Day 3), InboxWatcher schema-gating (Day 4). Charter 5.4 schema ownership matrix is now in types.ts and `fcop/internal/p4-day5-schema-drift.md` (Day 5). 141/141 tests pass (serial mode default — see scripts.test), 3 workspace tsc clean, 2 smoke modes (skip + real fcop) verified. Backed by codeflow-shell. Not published to npm — internal preview only.
